description: Reusable search patterns for widening source leads and mining verified dystopian AI quote candidates.

records.label: Blade Runner classics
records.query_text: Blade Runner Roy Batty tears in rain Tyrell quotes IMDb Wikiquote
records.goal: Find additional recognizable Blade Runner lines beyond the existing approval set.
records.success_signal: Multiple stable quote pages or high-confidence quote variants.
records.notes: Best when the user wants more recognizable film lines.

records.label: Black Mirror copied consciousness
records.query_text: Black Mirror White Christmas Be Right Back copied consciousness quotes IMDb transcript
records.goal: Find strong AI punishment, replacement, and digital consciousness lines.
records.success_signal: An ominous line with stable wording and strong episode context.
records.notes: High-yield modern lane for quote-rich AI dread.

records.label: Asimov robot law pass
records.query_text: Isaac Asimov robot quotes I Robot The Complete Robot laws of robotics
records.goal: Widen literary robot-control and personhood coverage from a canonical author lane.
records.success_signal: A quotable line tied to a recognizable Asimov work with clear attribution.
records.notes: Useful when the corpus needs more books and classic robot fiction.

records.label: Foundation control systems
records.query_text: Foundation psychohistory control system quotes Asimov
records.goal: Mine adjacent control-dystopia lines from the Foundation lane.
records.success_signal: A line that feels relevant to AI/system control rather than generic empire politics.
records.notes: Useful when the user specifically asks for Foundation.

records.label: Frank Herbert anti-machine
records.query_text: Frank Herbert thinking machines quotes Dune Butlerian Jihad
records.goal: Find memorable anti-machine lines with strong literary recognition.
records.success_signal: A line that directly names machine domination or human dependency.
records.notes: Good for the adjacent anti-machine canon the user requested.

records.label: Orwell control language
records.query_text: George Orwell quotes future control surveillance boot stamping
records.goal: Find adjacent control-dystopia language that supports the AI tyranny theme.
records.success_signal: A line with strong future-control rhetoric and high recognizability.
records.notes: Adjacent lane, not core AI verification.

records.label: Robot rebellion film and game pass
records.query_text: robot rebellion quotes sci fi movie game AI uprising quotes
records.goal: Find ominous revolt lines from recognizable robot and AI rebellion works.
records.success_signal: A line tied to a named recognizable work, not just a generic slogan.
records.notes: Useful when the user asks for more robot revolt material.

records.label: Machine control language
records.query_text: machine control quotes dystopian AI total control surveillance
records.goal: Find lines about surrendering agency to systems and algorithms.
records.success_signal: A memorable line that reads clearly out of context.
records.notes: Good fallback for broad ominous-control hunts.

records.label: Machine consciousness and selfhood
records.query_text: AI consciousness quotes Ghost in the Shell Ex Machina Her westworld
records.goal: Find haunting selfhood and post-human identity lines.
records.success_signal: A line that is both ominous and reusable outside its full scene.
records.notes: Useful when the user asks for consciousness-heavy material.

records.label: Ominous AI game quotes
records.query_text: ominous AI video game quotes GLaDOS SHODAN Legion
records.goal: Keep the project from becoming too film-heavy while staying recognizable.
records.success_signal: A memorable game line from a major title with strong AI themes.
records.notes: Useful whenever game coverage feels thin.

records.label: IMDb AI movie quote sweep
records.query_text: site:imdb.com/title/ quotes artificial intelligence sci fi movie
records.goal: Find titles with already-aggregated quote pages for fast candidate harvesting.
records.success_signal: A title-specific IMDb quote page with stable ominous lines.
records.notes: Fastest way to widen film quote candidates.

records.label: Reddit literary AI recommendations
records.query_text: site:reddit.com/r/printSF AI fiction recommendations robots dystopia
records.goal: Find books and stories not already in the main canon list.
records.success_signal: A thread producing multiple plausible works to add to discovery.
records.notes: Best for keeping the literary lane fresh.

records.label: Reddit AI movie recommendations
records.query_text: site:reddit.com/r/scifi AI movie recommendations robot dystopia
records.goal: Find recognizable film and TV works that people still surface organically.
records.success_signal: A thread or list that yields recognizable missing titles.
records.notes: Useful when the film lane feels repetitive.

records.label: Wikiquote topic page pass
records.query_text: site:en.wikiquote.org robot artificial intelligence dystopia quotes
records.goal: Find quote-rich topic pages and title pages quickly.
records.success_signal: A stable quote page that yields more than one usable lead.

records.label: Long-tail AI dystopia books
records.query_text: obscure classic AI dystopia novels quotes robots supercomputer fiction
records.goal: Push past the most obvious canon once recognizability coverage is healthy.
records.success_signal: A work that repeatedly appears across independent discovery surfaces.

records.label: Transcript hint sweep
records.query_text: AI movie transcript quotes ominous robot lines site:subslikescript.com
records.goal: Generate follow-up leads when stable quote pages are thin.
records.success_signal: A promising line worth verifying later from a stronger source.

records.label: Gemini widening prompt
records.query_text: Give me 20 recognizable dystopian AI works likely to contain ominous quotable lines, grouped by medium and decade.
records.goal: Broaden the candidate work queue with new title clusters.
records.success_signal: A batch of plausible works that can be verified elsewhere.
records.notes: Idea generation only, never final quote truth.

records.label: ChatGPT widening prompt
records.query_text: Suggest recognizable AI dystopia books, films, shows, and games with likely ominous quote scenes; bias toward classics first, then long-tail.
records.goal: Generate alternate widening angles and reduce blind spots.
records.success_signal: A usable set of titles or author lanes to verify manually.
records.notes: Idea generation only, not quote verification.

records.label: Claude widening prompt
records.query_text: Generate increasingly obscure but still worthwhile dystopian AI works that may contain memorable lines about machine control, rebellion, or synthetic consciousness.
records.goal: Push beyond the current canon without losing thematic fit.
records.success_signal: A follow-up work list with some overlap and some genuinely new leads.
